title: Validate Required Keys and Types
description: Check whether a dict matches a simple schema of required keys and their expected types.
problem: Write validate_schema(data, schema) where schema is a dict like {'name': str, 'age': int}. Return True only if every key in schema exists in data AND has the correct type.
hint: Loop over schema.items(); if key not in data or not isinstance(data[key], expected_type): return False. Return True after the loop.
